titleStmt.title: SII 38.506: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 506. (A.R. No. 506 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the south wall, Āṇḍavar shrine, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkaravatti Kulōttuṅga chōḷa, who was pleased to take Madurai, Īḻam and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya. Year 24, Mēsha, śu. di. 4, Rōsaṇi = Friday, 29th March 1202 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged. This inscription records a gift of land by a maid servant (agambaḍipeṇḍugaḷ) of the temple, Periya Nāchchi-uḍaiyār Nāchchi of Āṟagaḷūr in Āṟṟūkūṟṟam in Vaḍakarai Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, to the god uḍaiyār Tugumāmaṇi-nāyanār of Ūṟṟattūr in the same nāḍu, for providing offerings (tiruppaḍimāṟṟu) to the saints (muttirattu-nāyaṉār). It seems that the gifted land, both wet and dry, as dēvadāna was bought from two individuals of Śrīkaṇṭa-chatūrvēdimaṅgalam for five hundred and fifty kāśu. The inscription also contains details on some land transactions but it is not clear whether they are related to the present grant or not, on account of the damaged nature of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum karuvūrum pāṇṭiyan muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 4āvatu meṣa nāyaṟṟu pūrva pakṣattu catutti
yum peṟṟa Urocaṇi nāḷ vaṭakarai Irājarājavaḷanāṭṭu Āṟṟūr kūṟṟattu Āṟakaḷūr nāyanār Akampaṭip peṇṭukaḷil periya nācci Uṭaiya nācciyen Irājarājavaḷanāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūruṭaiyār tukumāmaṇi nāyanārkoyilil
muttiṟattu nāyanmāṟkku tiruppaṭimāṟṟukku tevatānamāka koṇṭu viṭṭa nañcey puṉcey nilamāvatu Innāṭṭu nampikuṟicciyān śrīkaṇṭaśaturvvetimaṅkalattu kaucikan cirāṇṭāṟ tukumāmaṇiyum cirāṇṭāṟ peri
yān cey nilam Oru māvum kaḷarnilam Iraṇṭu māvum vaṭakkil kaḷarilnilam Oru māvarai mukkāṇiyum Āka nilam mākāṇikku kācu Aiññūṟṟaim koṇṭa puncey nilamāvatu paṭaiyāṭi vaṭaiyāṭi ceyyil kīḻ talaiyu mukkāl Iraṇṭu māvūm cūṟṟi nakattil nilam Oru māvaraiyum ta
rupattiraṇṭaraiyum kaucikan tirumaḻapāṭi Uṭaiyān cakkarapāṇi ṭu nilam Iraṇṭu māvum koṭaṉaṭippaṉṉi ḷa nilam I p pāran toṇṭi nilam Iru māvaraiyum koḷakālil vaṭakkaṭaiya nila rai māvum Āka nilam Onṟe kālukku kācu Eṇṇūṟo
yum kāval nilam mū Oru velikkuk ḷaṭaṟ ceynilamāvatu tiruvāḷaṟ kuṇṭu nilai kāṇi
kkuk kiḻakkil tiruvāḷan kuṇṭu cey nilamā la kocaya nilattu koḷkāla nila Āṟu māvum I pāḻi
talaiyāl nilam Araiyum ṟu nūṟṟaim pun tonappaṭaiyāṭi ceykku kiḻakkil paṭaiyāṭi lāmaṟ
vayāṟuṭaiyānum pakkal kaucikaṟ Aṇṇāma tevanum kaucikaṟ piḷḷaiyāḻvān tukumāmaṇiyum piḷḷai n tiru�
pākan nattam nilam Oru veli kkīḻ vāvai nilam kāṇi ṟaim Araimāvukku kācu Irunūṟṟeḻupattaiñcum puncey ni Iṟā pa
tum Uyyavantān tirunilaiaḻaki ṟum puncey nilam pa n tukumāmaṇiyān panmāyecura nampiyum Uyyavantāṉ
lliyāṇan macakkal nilam Oru ttaiñcum Āka ni ḷaṟai nāyakanum pakkal koṇṭa nancey ṟu cavā
lam Iraṇṭumāvukku kācu Āyi ṟattu nāyanmāṟku yyil naṭuvaṭaiya nilam Araiye mā Arai m Āka ni
m Āka nilam Araikku kācu mun �cci Uṭaiya nā mukkāṇi
ttiraṇṭaraiyum koṇṭu I kumāmaṇiyān māyecuvaran munṟu kku kā nālā
pa māmaṇiyum Aṇṇāmalai tiruviḷakkeṇṇaiyum Uḷḷiṭṭa veñcanattukku tevatāna
māka kalveṭṭikkuṭuttom Ippaṭikku piḷḷaiyāḻvān tukumāmaṇi kā yum nampiyāṇṭān coḻavaranum cīrāṇṭān periyatevanum kaucikan tirumaḻapāṭi
cakkarapāṇiyum kaucikan Uyya
yāṟu ṭaiyānum Ivvanaivom Ivarkaḷ paṇiyā
l nāṭṭukkaṇakkan kuṟicci Uṭai
Digital edition of SII 38.506 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
